meta.title: Guy Labrie - Consultation TI Inc
meta.description: Guy Labrie - Consultation TI Inc — Senior Enterprise Architect with 35 years of experience. Expertise in Kafka, cloud infrastructure, DevOps, and telecommunications.

hero.title: Architecture and data streaming solutions that deliver business value
hero.lead: Guy Labrie - Consultation TI Inc is a solo IT consulting practice backed by 35 years of experience leading architecture, DevOps, and data streaming initiatives — from Kafka platforms on GCP to enterprise modernization in telecommunications.

about.title: Guy Labrie - Consultation TI Inc
about.subtitle: A one-person IT consulting firm with a focus on results
about.paragraph1: Guy Labrie - Consultation TI Inc is a solo IT consulting firm led by a Senior Enterprise Architect with 35 years of experience in telecommunications and enterprise technology. I specialize in leading architecture design and development teams to deliver comprehensive technical solutions with maximum business value.
about.paragraph2: My background spans Kafka data streaming, cloud infrastructure on GCP and AWS, DevOps, security, and large-scale network operations. Whether modernizing legacy platforms or building self-managed Kafka clusters, I work directly with stakeholders to translate strategy into reliable, scalable systems.
about.credentials: B.Sc. Computer Science, Université de Sherbrooke · AWS & GCP cloud training · Fluent in French and English

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.subtitle: My core competencies and technical focus areas

items.title: Kafka & Data Streaming
items.description: Architecture, design, and SRE for enterprise Kafka platforms. Cloud migration of on-premise streaming services, KRaft transitions, cluster upgrades, and operational excellence with high availability at scale.

items.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
items.description: GCP and AWS cloud platforms with Terraform and Ansible automation. Infrastructure as code, GitLab CI/CD, Vault, and Zabbix monitoring for repeatable, secure deployments across environments.

items.title: Architecture & DevOps
items.description: Enterprise architecture, application modernization, microservices, and containerization on OpenShift. Agile and SAFe practices, DevOps culture, and cross-functional team leadership across complex programs.

items.title: Security & Network Operations
items.description: Security protocols, network architecture, and large-scale infrastructure operations. Experience managing national network operations, multi-site expansion, and business continuity through critical events.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: 35 years in telecommunications and enterprise technology

items.title: Senior Enterprise Architect / SRE — Kafka, Bell Canada (via CGI)
items.description: Lead planning, design, and architecture of Bell's data streaming vision and on-premise-to-cloud Kafka migration. Coordinate cross-functional Bell and CGI teams, maintain EDP Kafka infrastructure, drive incident resolution, and mentor team members.

items.title: Senior Enterprise Architect — Bell Canada
items.description: Technology evangelist for Kafka, Agile, OpenShift, security, and DevOps adoption. Led Kafka SRE team architecture and support. Spearheaded application modernization through microservices, virtualization, and containerization across critical systems.

items.title: Senior Technical Advisor — Bell Canada
items.description: Managed the National Network Operation Center and directed corporate network expansion to 100+ sites. Led three major OS migrations from Solaris to Windows NT and Windows XP, ensuring business continuity through the Ice Storm, Y2K, and 9/11 events.

items.title: System Administrator — Bell Canada
items.description: Established one of Bell's first PC networks using Banyan VINES and expanded it from a dozen workstations to 250 workstations and 5 servers — laying the foundation for the organization's network infrastructure growth.

connect.title: Connect
connect.subtitle: Let's discuss how I can help your organization
connect.text: Interested in working together? Reach out via LinkedIn or email. I'm always open to conversations about technology strategy, architecture reviews, and consulting engagements.
